final:
// // This T-flip-flop does not toggle its output 'Q' on the rising edge of a clock signal when 'T' is high.
module T_FlipFlop (
    input wire T,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (T) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // Toggle Q if T is high
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This T-flip-flop does not toggle its output 'Q' on the rising edge of a clock signal when 'T' is high.
